reference: MOREOVER THE SULTAN COMMANDED HIS WAZIR DANDAN CALL A TEN DAYS HALT OF THE ARMY THAT HE MIGHT BE PRIVATE WITH HIM AND LEARN FROM HIM HOW AND WHEREFORE HIS FATHER HAD BEEN SLAIN
text: Moreover, the Sultan commanded his Wazir Dandan, call a ten days halt of the army, that he might be private with him, and learn from him how and wherefore his father had been slain.
